column1: # authentic R3.4a behavior of showing icon descriptions on hover.
# The description is routed to control-panel line 3 (the same slot
# used for menu-item help text; see SPEC §4).
# Transcripts poke App::set_hovered_icon directly via the
# HOVER_ICON / HOVER_CLEAR directives — the headless render buffer
# has no real icon panel to hit-test against, so we test the
# render contract here and leave the mouse-coord plumbing to
# Panel 1 slot 0 is the Save icon (icon id #5).
ASSERT_PANEL_L3 Saves the current worksheet file
# Clearing the hover returns line 3 to blank.
# Switching panels: panel 3 slot 5 is :Format Color-Background
# Hover during LABEL entry must not steal line 3 — the entry
# buffer owns line 2, and line 3 stays blank (not the hover
# description), so the user's in-progress work is never masked.
# Escape back to READY, then confirm the hover text reappears.
ASSERT_PANEL_L3 Saves the current worksheet file
